title: Unofficial F/A Speedrunning Modpack
description: The unofficial F/A speedrunning modpack. Contains F/A and speedrunning mods.
body:
## The Unofficial F/A Speedrunning Modpack
F/A is a minecraft dinosaur mod, that has never been speedrun. On the 16th of September 2025, me, cyn and mariokid64DS decided that we wanted to speedrun it. 

This modpack has all the essentials that are needed for speedrunning, and F/A. It also includes 3 F/A categories: F/A Any%, which is the speedrun of beating anu, F/A EGG%, which is the speedrun of getting any dino egg and F/A DNA%, which is the speedrun of getting any dino egg.

For more information on categories, rules, leaderboards, etc join the discord server linked on the modrinth page.
